table_metadata.description: This is a data table containing unique activations for DISH TV accounts between 4th Quarter 2018 and 1st quarter 2026. each row represents one acquisition to the brand. to be counted. a customer must have activated, been active on the pull date, and been active on the final day of the quarter.
special_rules: Unless explicitly told to, don't sum row totals for this table - instead, look to other tables for monthly totals, and use this for averages and per-subscriber data.
There is no data for 2021 3rd Quarter. There were still activations, but remove this time frame unless otherwise specified.
All activations in 2023 1st quarter are in the dataset, but will all be tagged as 4Q2022: cohort 3 in the Promo_Cohort column, and have Activation_Date as 12/31/2022.

columns.name: Acnt_Id
columns.description: Account ID - DO NOT REFERENCE - this column has been removed from the data for a period of time until security clearances are in place. If a unique ID is needed, reference the temp_id column

columns.name: Pull_Date
columns.description: Date the account was added to document
columns.range_of_outcomes: typically the end of the month that they activated in(1/31/2025 for anyone activated between 1/1/2025 and 1/31/2025)

columns.name: Pr_Flag
columns.description: puerto rico flag - if the customer is in puerto rico.

columns.name: Beacon_Score_10Pt
columns.range_of_outcomes: Buckets of 10 points, from 490-499 to 750-759 and 760+

columns.name: Sales_Channel
columns.range_of_outcomes: Direct, OE, National_accounts, TVRO, Dishone, telco

columns.name: Activation_Plan
columns.description: Activation Plan, or how the customer's contract is set up
columns.range_of_outcomes: DHA Elite(24 month price lock, leased hardware, excellent credit), DHA Plus(24 month contract, leased hardware with upgrade fees, good credit), DHA Standard(24 month contract, activation fee, leased hardware with upgrade fees, standard credit), flex(no contract, high activation fee, purchased hardware, starter credit), flex24(24 month contract, activation fees, leased hardware with upgrade fees, no credit check)

columns.name: Dwelling
columns.description: Type of building service is to
columns.range_of_outcomes: SFU(single family unit) or MDU(multi dwelling unit)

columns.name: Owner_Occpncy
columns.description: whether or not the owner of the property is the occupier

columns.name: Core_Package
columns.description: the core TV package the customer purchases
columns.range_of_outcomes: many options withmost common being Americas_Top_120, Americas_Top_200, Latino_Plus, Americas_Top_120_Plus, etc.

columns.name: Geobucket
columns.description: how well the satelites can see the location
columns.range_of_outcomes: 1-9, 1 being the best location and 9 being the worst location for satelite purposes

columns.name: Primary_Rcvr
columns.range_of_outcomes: many options, h3 - hopper 3, or the wally, or older receiver models like 211

columns.name: Geo_Segment
columns.range_of_outcomes: very rural, rural, suburban, urban, very urban

columns.name: Activation_Date
columns.description: when the customer activated their service
columns.range_of_outcomes: any date in the range of data

columns.name: Tfn
columns.description: toll free number, tied to marketing push

columns.name: Tactic
columns.description: how the customer engaged with dish
columns.range_of_outcomes: Direct mail(account 611030), digital(account 618250), other, TV(account 611010 activity 330200-330230), unknown, print(activity 611020), OOH/out of home(account 611010 activity 330260), radio(account 611010 activity 330250)

columns.name: Sub_Tactic
columns.description: subtactic of how the customer engaged, somewhat corelative with activity codes
columns.range_of_outcomes: many options like social, email, newspaper, none, unknown, other

columns.name: Bucket
columns.description: what bucket of marketing the customer falls into
columns.range_of_outcomes: many options like 11_170_1600 DRTV (company 111, department 170, Direct response television adds)

columns.name: Prequal_Flag_Test
columns.description: whether or not the user is prequalified

columns.name: Joey_Count
columns.description: number of secondary receivers the customer gets

columns.name: WA_Churn
columns.description: estimated months the customer will stay on
columns.formula: based on estimated churn, but not exact

columns.name: Yr1_ProgDisc
columns.description: programming cost discount the customer receives in year 1

columns.name: Yr2_ProgDisc
columns.description: programming cost discount the customer receives in year 2

columns.name: Yr3_ProgDisc
columns.description: programming cost discount the customer receives in year 3

columns.name: Yr1_Disc_Fact
columns.description: discount factor year 1 - converts to ~5% disc. Rate

columns.name: Yr2_Disc_Fact
columns.description: discounnt factor year 2 - converts to ~7.5% discount rate

columns.name: Yr3_Disc_Fact
columns.description: discount factor year 3 - converts to ~8% disc. Rate

columns.name: Prog_Disc_New
columns.description: Total Programming Discount given to the customer upon activation

columns.name: PL_Equip_ODU
columns.description: ODU equipment that appears on P&L statement

columns.name: PL_Equip_Other
columns.description: other equipment that appears on the P&L statement

columns.name: PL_Equip
columns.description: All equipment cost that appears on P&L

columns.name: Reman_Cost
columns.description: remaining equipment cost not allocated to P&L or CapEx

columns.name: Total_Equipment_Cost
columns.formula: exact sum of columns CapEx, PL_Equip, and Reman_Cost

columns.name: CC_Act_Fees
columns.description: account fees that are costs to the customer

columns.name: CC_Equip_Fees
columns.description: equipment fees that are a cost to the customer

columns.name: Gift_Card_Amount
columns.description: gift card given to customer amount $

columns.name: Marketing
columns.description: total marketing cost attributed to the user

columns.name: Direct_Sales
columns.description: total direct sales marketing attributed to the user

columns.name: Activation_Incentives
columns.description: total activation incentives given to the user

columns.name: sac
columns.formula: =nearly exact sum of the following columns: Prog_Disc_new; Total_Equipment_Cost; CC_Acct_Fees; CC_Equip_Fees; RAF; Gift_Card_Amount; Marketing; Direct_Sales; Activation_Incentives; Install

columns.name: Core_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from their core packages

columns.name: Intl_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from their international package

columns.name: A_La_Carte_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from a la carte add ons

columns.name: Channel_Packs_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from channel packs (sports package, etc.)

columns.name: Adult_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from adult package

columns.name: Locals_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from local channels

columns.name: Other_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from other sources

columns.name: Adult_Bundles_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from adult package

columns.name: Equip_Price
columns.description: how much customer pays for equipment

columns.name: Ad_Sales_Revenue
columns.description: average revenue per user from ad sales

columns.name: NC_ARPU
columns.formula: sum of all other income columns

columns.name: RSNs_ARPU
columns.description: average revenue per user from regional sports networks

columns.name: A_La_Carte_COGS
columns.description: cost of a la carte programming

columns.name: RSNs_COGS
columns.description: cost of regional sport networks programming

columns.name: Xtra_COGS_PPV
columns.description: cost of pay per view programming

columns.name: NC_COGS
columns.description: new customer cost of goods sold
columns.formula: sum of all other expense columns

columns.name: Mo_Inc_Prot
columns.description: related to monthly incentives but unsure what exactly

columns.name: Manufacturing
columns.description: cost of manufacturing and/or remanufacturing equipment for next use

columns.name: mcf
columns.formula: total revenue per month minus total cogs minus all other expenses

columns.name: npvwostwodep
columns.description: net present value, not including satelite & transmissions & depreciation expenses

columns.name: Media_Sales_Local
columns.description: local channel fees from media sales

columns.name: Activation_Month
columns.description: activation month - use for sql querries about dates or time series

columns.name: Activation_Year
columns.description: activation year - use for sql querries about dates or time series
